name: Dunston, Teams, Whickham, Swalwell and Lobley Hill (Gateshead Inner West)

locations.address: Whickham Police Station Front Street Whickham NE16 4HE

description: As well as policing more urban areas in the town centre and its nearby suburbs, we also police more rural areas of country parkland and woodland to the west of Gateshead. Our police bases in Gateshead are located in Whickham, in the town centre and in the Metro Centre shopping complex.
